data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 6/13 (Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students' skill!

🗓️Period: 6/13 (Mon) 19:00 – 6/20 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
